title: Failed Bank Robbery — Wants to Surrender
brief: A 24-year-old male attempted to rob a bank but the silent alarm triggered before he could leave. He is now trapped inside with 3 employees. He has a handgun but has not pointed it at anyone. He appears panicked and has expressed willingness to give up if he won't be harmed.

demands.text: Promise I won't be shot when I come out

opening_message: I... I didn't mean for this to happen. I just need money for my mom's surgery. Please don't shoot me. I'll come out, just... promise me they won't shoot.
